entities.description: Growth index measured 10 days after bloom date

entities.description: The date when the plant flowers

entities.description: Ratio of grain yield to total biomass

entities.description: The vertical height of the plant

entities.description: Statistical method used to determine relative importance of genetic effects

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENETIC EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects that contribute to the additive variance of a trait

entities.name: DOMINANCE GENETIC EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects resulting from the interaction of alleles at a single locus

entities.name: HETEROTIC GENETIC EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects associated with hybrid vigor

entities.name: ADDITIVE X ADDITIVE EPISTATIC EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects resulting from interactions between additive effects at different loci

entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
